title: Contact Form
description: A complex form challenge featuring custom validation logic, accessible error states, and responsive grid layouts. Focuses on interactive radio groups, checkboxes, and state management for success messages.

title: FAQ Accordion
description: A functional FAQ component built using semantic HTML5 details and summary elements. Focuses on accessible design, hover states for interactivity, and responsive layouts using CSS Grid.

title: Interactive Rating Component
description: A clean, accessible rating component that captures user feedback. Features a custom radio-button scale, state-swapping with JavaScript, and a 95% accessibility score via Lighthouse.

title: Frontend Quiz App
description: A functional multi-choice quiz application featuring category selection, progress tracking, and score calculation.

title: Password Generator App
description: A functional password generator applications that allows the user generate a password based on selected options, copy to clipboard and see strength rating.

title: Social Links Profile
description: A clean, card-based profile layout featuring a collection of social links. This project focuses on mastering basic CSS Flexbox, semantic navigation lists, and hover state transitions for interactive elements.

title: Blog Preview Card
description: A responsive content card featuring a clean layout and hover states. Focuses on foundational CSS skills like box-shadow techniques, custom typography, and semantic HTML structure using the time element.

title: QR Code Component
description: A fundamental layout challenge focused on CSS positioning, border-radius, and responsive typography. Utilizes semantic HTML structure with figure and figcaption for optimal SEO and accessibility.
